flavor.en: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils.

babyInfo.en: If this Baby Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and your opponent tries to attack, your opponent flips a coin (before doing anything required in order to use that attack). If tails, your opponent's turn ends without an attack.

text.en: All Pokémon Powers stop working until the end of your next turn.
